title: OC2R: Library
description: This makes it so that if you want to know more about the uses and have more stuff to read in the manual its there.
body:
Welcome to OC2R: Library.  This mod is an extension of the current built-in lanuages, for OpenCOmputers II: Reimagined.  The languages found here, are odd-balls, or Open Computers 1, operating systems that we enjoyed from the past.  For anyone that would like to have their programs, or language libraries to add as a mod for the general public, we will add documentation of syntex, recipes, compatibilities and whatever you need to add to it.

  As a person that will work on this project, you will have the option to have your name added to this project for a rewards share, if you see so fit.  This mod will stay open source as any and all OC2R: Addons are under the MIT license.  We maintain the projects, we agreed to the previews people, and respect all the work of everyone involved in the new work.

This mod will make it so that you can have,

- Fuctions Wiki (WIP)
- Coding Wiki (WIP)
- Tutorial Wiki (WIP)





Our Discord server:

https://discord.gg/cVGFBcZf4A

We use the following server provider:
![https://serversforyou.com/aff.php?aff=8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5451347b0e999f706728598b171f3129319edcfd.png)
